steps.title: Identify the input meaning
steps.content: The variable $x$ represents years after the company started selling headphones online. Therefore $f(5)$ means the predicted annual revenue $5$ years after the company started.

steps.title: Interpret the output
steps.content: The value of the function is measured in dollars. So the statement $f(5)\sim 522{,}547$ means the predicted annual revenue after $5$ years is about $522{,}547$ dollars. The answer is A.
